headlines.title: Iran's Revolutionary Guards Launch Missile and Drone Strikes on Israel and Gulf Sites
headlines.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards conducted strikes on Israeli targets and US-linked Gulf facilities. Regional tensions escalate as US faces criticism; Secretary Rubio attends G7 meeting in France. Impacts global oil flows and security.

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Troops and Enter Congo's Goma Displacing One Million
headlines.summary: Rebels entered Goma after gunfire and shelling routed Congolese forces; UN estimates over 1 million displaced inside the aid hub city. Humanitarian crisis worsens; risks broader regional instability.

headlines.title: Trump Extends Deadline for Iran to Reopen Strait of Hormuz to April 6
headlines.summary: President Trump postponed strikes on Iran's power grid, moving deadline from Friday to April 6. Oil prices rose and stocks fell amid stalled talks. Threatens further escalation in oil transit disruptions.

headlines.title: Drone Strikes Kill 28 Civilians in Sudan North Darfur Market and Kordofan Truck
headlines.summary: Strikes hit a North Darfur market killing 22 including an infant and a civilian truck in North Kordofan killing 6, injuring 17 more. Civil war nears fourth year; prolongs suffering for millions.

headlines.title: China's SMIC Supplies Chipmaking Tools to Iran Military US Officials Say
headlines.summary: Sanctioned SMIC sent chipmaking technology to Iran's military about a year ago per US officials. Heightens concerns over tech proliferation amid Iran tensions; SMIC denies military ties.

framings.angle: US officials detail SMIC sending chipmaking tools to Iran military roughly one year ago
SMIC denies ties to Chinese military-industrial complex despite US trade blacklist since 2020

headlines.title: Olympic Committee Bars Transgender Athletes from Women's Competition Events
headlines.summary: IOC requires genetic testing for women's events starting 2028 Los Angeles Games, most significant policy since new president elected. Affects transgender athletes; sparks fairness debates in sports.

framings.angle: Notes decision as most significant since Kirsty Coventry elected IOC president last year
Explains new policy mandates genetic testing for women's events from 2028 Games

headlines.title: Zelenskyy Confirms US Links Ukraine Security Guarantees to Ceding Donbas
headlines.summary: Zelenskyy states US peace deal requires handing Russian-occupied Donbas for guarantees on day 1,492 of war. Pressures Kyiv amid stalled talks; alters NATO aid prospects.
headlines.previousContext: Zelensky publicly details US proposal requiring land cession

headlines.title: Israel Allows Palestinians to Cross Military Zone Back to Northern Gaza
headlines.summary: Israel permitted displaced Gazans to return after breaking hostage release deadlock. Eases humanitarian strain in bisected enclave; depends on ongoing truce compliance.
headlines.previousContext: Hostage release breakthrough breaks deadlock enabling zone crossing

headlines.title: NATO Deploys First Coordinated Response to Baltic Sea Cable Sabotage
headlines.summary: Alliance activates response after another deep-sea cable severed in suspected campaign. Protects critical infrastructure; signals heightened deterrence against hybrid threats.
headlines.previousContext: Further cable severance prompts alliance's initial coordinated action
